ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "PropertyType" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "City" TEXT /* City name */,
  "State" TEXT /* State name */,
  "ZipCode" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "PropertyId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "SaleDate" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "SalePrice" REAL /* Sale price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "PropertyTypeId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the property_types table */,
  "LocationId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "TrendDate" TEXT /* Date of trend */,
  "TrendValue" REAL /* Trend value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "Username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "Password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "Role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., real estate agent, broker, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "PropertyId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "UserId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "CollaborationDate" TEXT /* Date of collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "Id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "PropertyId" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "ReportDate" TEXT /* Date of report */,
  "ReportValue" REAL /* Report value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
)
